mapper.select: SELECT b.*, c.name as courtName, u.username as userName, u.phone as userPhone, CASE WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消审核中）' WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消已驳回）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核中）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核已驳回）' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '已取消' WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '待付款' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '已付款' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN b.status = 4 THEN '已过期' ELSE '未知' END as statusText FROM booking b LEFT JOIN court c ON b.court_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC, b.start_time DESC, b.create_time DESC

SELECT b.*, c.name as courtName, u.username as userName, u.phone as userPhone, CASE WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消审核中）' WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消已驳回）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核中）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核已驳回）' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '已取消' WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '待付款' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '已付款' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN b.status = 4 THEN '已过期' ELSE '未知' END as statusText FROM booking b LEFT JOIN court c ON b.court_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id}

SELECT b.*, c.name as courtName, u.username as userName, u.phone as userPhone, CASE WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消审核中）' WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消已驳回）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核中）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核已驳回）' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '已取消' WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '待付款' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '已付款' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN b.status = 4 THEN '已过期' ELSE '未知' END as statusText FROM booking b LEFT JOIN court c ON b.court_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.booking_no = #{bookingNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking ( booking_no, court_id, user_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, duration, unit_price, total_amount, coupon_code, coupon_discount, pay_amount, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, status, cancel_request_status, payment_channel, pay_time, payment_verify_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{bookingNo}, #{courtId}, #{userId}, #{bookingDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{couponCode}, #{couponDiscount}, #{payAmount}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, IFNULL(#{cancelRequestStatus}, 0), #{paymentChannel}, #{payTime}, IFNULL(#{paymentVerifyStatus}, 0), #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE booking SET court_id = #{courtId}, booking_date = #{bookingDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, coupon_code = #{couponCode}, coupon_discount = #{couponDiscount}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, cancel_request_status = #{cancelRequestStatus}, payment_channel = #{paymentChannel}, pay_time = #{payTime}, payment_verify_status = #{paymentVerifyStatus}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE booking SET cancel_request_status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND cancel_request_status IN (0, 2) AND payment_verify_status IN (0, 2)
UPDATE booking SET status = 0, cancel_request_status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND cancel_request_status = 1
UPDATE booking SET cancel_request_status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND cancel_request_status = 1

UPDATE booking SET status = 2, payment_channel = #{channel}, pay_time = NOW(), payment_verify_status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND cancel_request_status IN (0, 2) AND payment_verify_status IN (0, 2)

UPDATE booking SET payment_verify_status = 1, payment_channel = #{channel}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND cancel_request_status IN (0, 2) AND payment_verify_status IN (0, 2)
UPDATE booking SET status = 2, payment_verify_status = 0, pay_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND payment_verify_status = 1 AND status = 1
UPDATE booking SET payment_verify_status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND payment_verify_status = 1 AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, c.name as courtName, u.username as userName, u.phone as userPhone, CASE WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消审核中）' WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消已驳回）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核中）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核已驳回）' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '已取消' WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '待付款' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '已付款' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN b.status = 4 THEN '已过期' ELSE '未知' END as statusText FROM booking b LEFT JOIN court c ON b.court_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.cancel_request_status = 1 ORDER BY b.update_time DESC

SELECT b.*, c.name as courtName, u.username as userName, u.phone as userPhone, CASE WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消审核中）' WHEN b.cancel_request_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（取消已驳回）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核中）' WHEN b.payment_verify_status = 2 AND b.status = 1 THEN '待付款（付款审核已驳回）' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '已取消' WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '待付款' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '已付款' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN b.status = 4 THEN '已过期' ELSE '未知' END as statusText FROM booking b LEFT JOIN court c ON b.court_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.payment_verify_status = 1 AND b.status = 1 ORDER BY b.update_time DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM booking WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking WHERE booking_date = CURDATE() AND status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3)

SELECT c.id as courtId, c.name as courtName, COUNT(b.id) as bookingCount, COALESCE(SUM(b.duration), 0) as totalHours, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_amount), 0) as totalAmount FROM court c LEFT JOIN booking b ON c.id = b.court_id AND b.status IN (1, 2, 3) AND b.booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY bookingCount DESC
